freeze_steps: Confirm the locked scope file still matches the intended organism and drug panel.
Refresh or review the accession manifest and update retrieval_status, retrieval_date, and label source fields.
Keep raw downloaded files under ignored roots only.
Compute SHA256 for the accession manifest used by the snapshot.
Update the snapshot manifest with checksum, referenced policy files, and summary counts.
Save a committed summary file set that explains the snapshot without needing live website state.
guardrails: Do not commit bulky raw downloads to the repository.
Do not freeze a snapshot that contains unclear provenance rows marked included.
Do not rely on unstated browser state to explain what a snapshot contains.
